mapper.update: UPDATE im_conversation SET last_message_id = #{lastMessageId}, last_message_time = #{lastMessageTime}, last_message_content = #{lastMessageContent}, last_message_sender = #{lastMessageSender}, last_message_seq = #{lastMessageSeq}, update_time = #{updateTime}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id} AND version = #{version} -- 乐观锁控制
